<!--
Thanks for contributing to MX Script! Please answer the three questions below.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- One paragraph max. -->

## Why?

<!-- The use case, the bug, or the motivation. Link to an issue if there is one. -->

## How did you test it?

<!-- Commands you ran, programs you wrote, edge cases you considered. -->

---

- [ ] `gofmt -w .` is clean
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/`, `README.md`, or `CHANGELOG.md` as applicable)
